authority: V43 admits the complete target-free frontier whose exact finite block graphs carry one independent cycle; it does not choose among retained rows.

required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: V42 supplies the complete sealed finite block graphs; the exact graph cycle-rank identity is forward-forced to the theorem's One.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: All 8,192 V42 component-cube graphs are classified and every row with edges - blocks + components = One is retained.
required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: One is the smallest positive independent-cycle count; zero is acyclic and therefore does not instantiate the named cycle form.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: For a fixed finite graph, edges - vertices + components uniquely determines its independent-cycle rank.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: Only the pre-comparison-sealed V42 graph census enters; target coordinates, TM, dRMSD and mask identities are absent.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Runtime halts on parent, source, cube, graph-rank, frontier, target-input or seal drift.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: A complete sealed L76 One-cycle frontier must be compared only after every retained structure is sealed.
